Payback! 😆 He thought I was still napping so I got to catch him jamming in the kitchen! Please ignore the hair and hoodie fidgeting! I literally woke up to him singing and my hoodie and hair was was all twisted around my head from sleeping and it was driving me crazy, but I could miss my opportunity! 😆 I love you, Terrance Aaron! Thank you for being my person and bringing me so much fun and laughter. 😘 Clip
